title: Stonecutter Enhanced++
description: Stonecutter Enhanced++ adds the use of wood / logs on stonecutters and allows renewable gravel by stonecutting cobblestone / stone and a lot of QoL features.
body:
![Stonecutter Enhanced++](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37fd8e906591f173e4671d956330b0ec3a1e99eb.png)

This adds cutting recipes for every type of planks, logs, stems and nylon, cobblestone, stone and amethyst. It allows you to cut the wood into the respective variants of stairs, slabs, fences, fence gates, doors, trapdoors, sticks, crafting tables and more with support for tools coming soon!
